summary: Registered Nurse with 7 years of hands-on clinical experience seeking to transition into Clinical Informatics. Combines deep understanding of patient care workflows and care coordination with developing technical skills in data analysis, EHR optimization, and clinical process improvement. Spearheaded unit-level quality initiatives that reduced medication errors by 22%. Currently pursuing Health Informatics certificate with Epic EHR project experience.

experience.title: Clinical Nurse II — Medical-Surgical Unit
bullets: Provided direct patient care on a 36-bed medical-surgical unit, utilizing Epic EHR for documentation, ordering, and care coordination
Led unit-level quality improvement initiative that reduced medication administration errors by 22% through clinical workflow redesign
Served as designated Epic super-user, troubleshooting EHR issues and training 15 nursing staff on new Epic module rollouts
Analyzed patient flow data in Excel to identify discharge bottlenecks, resulting in a 40-minute reduction in average discharge time
Collaborated with IT department on Epic upgrade testing, providing clinical validation for order set changes

experience.title: Registered Nurse — Emergency Department
bullets: Managed patient care in a high-acuity emergency department (Level II trauma center, 60K annual visits)
Documented clinical assessments and interventions using Cerner EHR system
Participated in department-wide process improvement initiatives to optimize patient throughput

certifications: Registered Nurse (RN) — California Board of Registered Nursing
